_comment: Configuration for enforce-tool-usage hook. Categories are evaluated in priority order (most specific first). Each chained/piped segment is scanned independently.

categories.name: privilege_escalation
categories.guidance: Do not use privilege escalation or permission/ownership commands in the terminal. These must be managed outside the agent.

categories.name: network
categories.guidance: Do not use network commands in the terminal. Use the fetch_webpage tool for HTTP reads. File transfers and remote connections must be performed by the user. See the tool-usage skill.

categories.name: git_subcommands
categories.guidance: Use GitKraken MCP tools (git_status, git_add_or_commit, git_log_or_diff, git_branch, git_checkout, git_push, git_blame, git_stash, git_worktree) instead of git in the terminal. See the tool-usage skill.

categories.name: test_runners
categories.guidance: Use the runTests tool instead of running tests in the terminal. See the tool-usage skill.

categories.name: file_operations
categories.guidance: Use read_file, replace_string_in_file, or create_file tools instead of file operations in the terminal. See the tool-usage skill.

categories.name: search
categories.guidance: Use semantic_search, grep_search, or file_search tools instead of search commands in the terminal. See the tool-usage skill.

categories.name: directory_listing
categories.guidance: Use the list_dir tool instead of directory listing commands in the terminal. See the tool-usage skill.

categories.name: interpreters
categories.guidance: Do not run scripts in the terminal. Show the script to the user and ask them to approve running it. See the tool-usage skill.
